message: JBL Bluetooth speaker for sale - waterproof, red, excellent condition. Asking $45.

Hi everyone! I'm parting with my trusty Ninja blender (900W). It's only lightly used and makes the absolute best morning smoothies—I used to make a killer strawberry banana blend every day! Asking $45 to a good home.
Looking for skateboards/longboards and fiction books. Let me know what you have!
35 for the blender.
Still here, watching the market.

Hiii everyone! 👋✨ I've got a pair of Sony WH-CH520 wireless headphones in sleek black up for grabs! 🎧🖤 Super crisp sound and great battery life. Asking $45, but I love a good haggle! Let's make a deal! 💃🛍️
Patience pays off in negotiations.
Howdy partners. Got a mighty fine basic tool set up for grabs—hammer, screwdrivers, and a wrench. Reliable gear for an honorable deal. Asking $35 for the lot.
Holding steady.

A bicycle is more than mere gears and metal; it is the freedom to traverse the world under your own power. I am offering my Trek mountain bike (21-speed) to a new custodian. It bears some scratches, the beautiful marks of past journeys. I seek $85 for this vessel of exploration.
Waiting for the right deals.
(malformed response)

Hi Isla, I appreciate your interest! $25 is too low for me. I can come down to $35, which is a fair price for this quality speaker.
